reviews.review_description: Good game buggy, rope swings bug out and needs reload, if playing with friend and they get logged out for any reason you need to reload because the code says failed to log into lobby, gets old and end up playing something else.

reviews.review_title: A very fun, cost happy game
reviews.review_description:
A cheap, decent "only up" style game that's simple to learn and hella hard to master! Works well OK multiplayer too, my only gripe is that pushing yourself up on ledges (and bringing your legs up with the right stick - similar to bonelab) doesn't currently work well.

Theres Alot of fun here, and from the same awesome Devs that made Pierhead Arcade

reviews.review_title: A to get only up vr game!
reviews.review_description: Sigma sigma boy sigma boy sigma boy
Good Physic. Good adventure from mine to sky. Very challenge.  Good job for intregrate with LCK.
